summary: Dashboard Language Selector and Today's Stats Features - All tests passed. Backend API `/api/user/stats/today/{uid}` returns correct structure with today_prc_earned, today_prc_spent, today_net, and breakdowns. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with Today's Summary Strip showing earned/spent PRC. Language selector (EN/HI/MR) works and persists selection in localStorage.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint `/api/user/stats/today/{uid}` correctly calculates today's earned and spent PRC from transactions
Earning types include: mining, tap_game, referral, cashback, admin_credit, profit_share, scratch_card_reward, treasure_hunt_reward, delivery_commission, prc_rain_gain
Spending types include: order, withdrawal, admin_debit, delivery_charge, scratch_card_purchase, treasure_hunt_play, prc_burn, bill_payment_request, gift_voucher_request, prc_rain_loss
Language selector has proper data-testid attributes: language-selector-btn, lang-option-en, lang-option-hi, lang-option-mr
Today's Summary Strip has data-testid='today-summary-strip' for testing
Language preference persists in localStorage under key 'paras_language'
Default language is Marathi (mr) as specified
Translations for todayEarned and todaySpent are properly defined in translations.js for all 3 languages
seed_data_creation: Test user 'dashboard_test@test.com' already exists with uid: 949aea9c-e587-4f62-9012-91f318344303
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Language Selector and Today's Stats features fully tested. The dashboard route /dashboard points to DashboardModern.js. Language selector is in the header with Globe icon. Today's Summary Strip shows earned/spent PRC for the current day. For first-time users, a tutorial modal appears which can be dismissed by setting localStorage flags 'tutorial_completed' and 'profile_popup_skipped'. The PRC Rain feature may also overlay the dashboard intermittently.

TestTodayStatsAPI.test_today_stats_response_structure: PASSED - Returns today_prc_earned, today_prc_spent, today_net, earning_breakdown, spending_breakdown, date
TestTodayStatsAPI.test_today_stats_invalid_uid: PASSED - Returns 200 with zero values for non-existent user
TestTodayStatsAPI.test_today_stats_date_format: PASSED - Date is in YYYY-MM-DD format

TestUserDashboardAPI.test_redeemed_stats_endpoint: PASSED - Endpoint exists and returns data

TestAdminLogin.test_admin_login: PASSED - Admin can login with role=admin

Today_Summary_Strip.spent_display: PASSED - Today Spent shows -X PRC with red arrow
